multi_window_anomaly_component: adds bounded priority when 1h/3h/6h/12h anomaly signals confirm each other; 24h is excluded
raw_point_ae_component: q999 rolling cmax plus q999_c32/union alarm bonus when raw AE features are available
risk_episode_component: adds priority when high/watch risk repeats within the last 48 hours
multi_horizon_component: adds priority for 24h/3d/7d persistence and rising risk trend
leadtime_component: leadtime is intentionally down-weighted so it acts as a reference signal after leadtime v2 ablation
leadtime_ordinal_component: adds a scaled small bonus from expected lead time and near-term probability
history_adjustment: recent task/any-event suppression only; days_since_last_fault_event is not used because it is not present in the current primary feature source
notes: Leadtime is model based and trained only on pre_fault rows, then inferred for all scored windows.
Priority remains rule based so operations can inspect and adjust weights separately.
